name: Rand Paul
subject: It's not over
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27912033:26830755319:m:1:879035888:9A83B21750294754A4CC626D99030C97:r)

Fellow Conservative:

When I walked off the U.S. Senate floor late last night, it didn't mark the "end" of the fight against out-of-control NSA spying.

This is only the beginning.

My 10.5 hour filibuster yesterday was the first successful roadblock - delaying any movement on "PATRIOT" Act reauthorization by at least one full day.

At this point in the fight, any legislative delay only increases pressure on spy state apologists - and increases the likelihood you and I could walk away with a win.

But Fellow Conservative, if you and I are going to succeed in finally stopping the NSA's ILLEGAL and unconstitutional spying schemes, every moment of the next few days will be absolutely critical.

I will not back down. I will not give an inch.

I will give everything I have to stop outright destruction of our Fourth Amendment right to privacy from government.

But I must be able to count on you to stand in my corner.

Spy state apologists know my colleagues in Congress are anxious to get out of town for the Memorial Day recess.

They think many Americans are just starting to tune out of politics in the anticipation of summer's return.

So what better time to RAM through another extension of the worst provisions of the so-called "PATRIOT Act?"

Fellow Conservative, if they ever listened to the men and women they're supposed to represent, they'd realize the American people's answer to that question is "NEVER!"

But I'm counting on your help to make Washington listen during this most important time.

Without it, I'll be just one man fighting.

After all, you and I have seen this happen before.

The most important -- and most controversial legislation -- is always saved until the last minute.

Then backers claim there's no time, even for debate.

And at the last minute, some backroom deal is rammed into law -- and the American people get sold down the river.

Well, I have news for Members of the Senate who just want to force another extension of the "PATRIOT Act" and get out of town: They are going NOWHERE any time soon.

It's just too important.

The foundation of this Republic we love -- the idea that free men and women can live their lives best out from under the control and watchful eye of domineering government -- is at stake.

This is an idea worth fighting for. **[Please continue to stand with me](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27912033:26830755319:m:1:879035888:9A83B21750294754A4CC626D99030C97:r)**.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27912034:26830755319:m:1:879035888:9A83B21750294754A4CC626D99030C97:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27912035:26830755319:m:1:879035888:9A83B21750294754A4CC626D99030C97:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27912036:26830755319:m:1:879035888:9A83B21750294754A4CC626D99030C97:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27912037:26830755319:m:1:879035888:9A83B21750294754A4CC626D99030C97:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27912033:26830755319:m:1:879035888:9A83B21750294754A4CC626D99030C97:r)
In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27912038:26830755319:m:1:879035888:9A83B21750294754A4CC626D99030C97:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27912039:26830755319:m:1:879035888:9A83B21750294754A4CC626D99030C97:r)[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27912040:26830755319:m:1:879035888:9A83B21750294754A4CC626D99030C97:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: randhpaulmd@gmail.com
subject: Video: I’m concerned
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

The most critical vote on ending the NSA's illegal bulk data collection could come as soon as Saturday.

Every minute is absolutely critical until then.

My ten and a half hour filibuster was just the start of my fight to end these assaults on our liberties.

**[Will you stand with me in the fight to end warrantless spying on Americans](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27919012:26838295516:m:1:879035888:EFF39F0C77B40BFE82D177454261F5A2:r)**?

A two month extension is unacceptable.

Phony reforms that permit the NSA's illegal domestic spying to continue under a comforting name is even worse.

I won't back down and I won't give an inch.

Last night's filibuster delayed a vote on the so-called "PATRIOT Act" by a legislative day.

And with this surveillance state scheme set to expire on May 31st, any delay puts you and me one step closer to ENDING illegal domestic spying.

Today I'm announcing a series of amendments I will propose to force the spy state apologists to debate their lawless schemes in front of the American people.

In fact, I've recorded **[a special video message](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27919012:26838295516:m:1:879035888:EFF39F0C77B40BFE82D177454261F5A2:r)** on what I plan to propose.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27919012:26838295516:m:1:879035888:EFF39F0C77B40BFE82D177454261F5A2:r)

I hope you will take a few moments to see how I propose to END illegal domestic spying for good.

I will force the spy state apologists to debate their lawless schemes in front of the American people including:

>> ENDING the bulk collection of data under Section 215 of the so-called "PATRIOT Act."

>> PROHIBITING granting immunity to third party companies that break user agreements.

>> BLOCKING evidence obtained from warrantless spying to be used against Americans in criminal cases not related to terrorism or espionage.

>> CREATING a constitutional advocate to argue before the FISA court to prevent national security letters to be authored free of due process.

>> STOPPING the use of "sneak and peek" searches whereby the government searches your property - even in non-terrorism cases - without a warrant or without even informing you.

>> DISCONTINUING warrantless spying on Americans created by executive order. The government MUST obtain a warrant to collect your phone records.

Fellow Conservative, if my filibuster didn't have the spy state apologists hopping mad, these amendments will leave them red-faced.

They thought they could get away with sneaking through a reauthorization of the so-called "PATRIOT Act" while everyone was enjoying Memorial Day weekend.

Now they are going to be forced to explain to the American people why they believe their government can ignore the Bill of Rights.

The clock is ticking and time is on our side.

The more you and I can turn up the pressure on Congress to extend the debate, the greater the chance the so-called "PATRIOT Act" will expire.

Last night's filibuster was the first successful step in our fight to END illegal spying.

Over 120,000 true patriots joined my filibuster last night.

Now I need to count on you to stand with me in the fight on the Senate floor to STOP warrantless domestic spying once and for all.

**[So please watch my video message and add your name to join the fight today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27919012:26838295516:m:1:879035888:EFF39F0C77B40BFE82D177454261F5A2:r)**!

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27919013:26838295516:m:1:879035888:EFF39F0C77B40BFE82D177454261F5A2:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27919014:26838295516:m:1:879035888:EFF39F0C77B40BFE82D177454261F5A2:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27919015:26838295516:m:1:879035888:EFF39F0C77B40BFE82D177454261F5A2:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27919016:26838295516:m:1:879035888:EFF39F0C77B40BFE82D177454261F5A2:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27919012:26838295516:m:1:879035888:EFF39F0C77B40BFE82D177454261F5A2:r)
In Liberty,

Senator Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27919017:26838295516:m:1:879035888:EFF39F0C77B40BFE82D177454261F5A2:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27919018:26838295516:m:1:879035888:EFF39F0C77B40BFE82D177454261F5A2:r)[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27919019:26838295516:m:1:879035888:EFF39F0C77B40BFE82D177454261F5A2:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Be there
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
Peter,
I can't wait to celebrate my birthday with Rick Harrison from
Pawn Stars in Las Vegas next Thursday -- and one very lucky
supporter.
It could be you.
But first you've got to enter. Click here to donate $5 and
you'll be entered to win.
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42153762:17174114739:m:3:1349778030:A9F3F604353450EE2B0B03E49D8C1567:r
It's a great opportunity: we'll fly you to Vegas, you'll
come to the party, and then you'll spend the night in a hotel on
the famous Las Vegas Strip.

Good luck!

Marco Rubio

Marco Rubio Las Vegas Birthday Contest Rules

-Contest ends May 24, 2015
-Limit one entry per individual
-Make a contribution and also enter
-You can also enter here without making a
contribution(http://rub.io/LQiiVF).
-See full terms and conditions below

NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE. No
contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win
this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your
chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution, click
here (http://rub.io/jcWzqE). To enter without making a
contribution, click here(http://rub.io/LQiiVF). Void where
prohibited. The Promotion begins on May 19, 2015 at 7:00 a.m.
Eastern Daylight Time and ends on Sunday, May 24, 2015 at 11:59pm
Eastern Daylight Time ("Entry Period"). All entries must be
received by 11:59pm Eastern Daylight Time on Saturday, May 31,
2014. One (1) winner will receive the following Prize: one round
trip coach airfare to Las Vegas, Nevada, with an approximate
retail value of eight hundred dollars ($800); admission to Marco
Rubio's Las Vegas Birthday Party Hosted by Rick Harrison, with an
approximate retail value of five hundred dollars ($500); one
night's stay at a Las Vegas hotel, with an approximate retail
value of two hundred dollars ($200); ground transportation costs
must be covered by the winner. Odds of winning depend on the
number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and
permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who
are legal residents of the United States and are at least 21
years of age.. Prize not redeemable for cash. The Sponsor is
Marco Rubio for President, PO Box 558701, Miami, FL 33255-8701.

Paid for by Marco Rubio for President

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: It won’t be the same without you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
I want to meet you. | [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjI2OTM2MTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyMDg3NDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0) Friend --

Months from now, I want to look back at this first big rally as the moment when we came together to celebrate the beginning of this campaign. I want to remember it as one that I shared with the people who are driving this campaign -- supporters like you.

**[I hope you'll add your name to be automatically entered for the chance to fly out and be there in person at the starting line.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjI2OTM2MTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyMDg3NDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
**
This campaign is being shaped one story at a time. Everywhere I go, I meet people whose words and stories stay with me.

**I'd like you to be one of the next people I meet. Come join me and tell me your story:
**
**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/meet-hillary/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjI2OTM2MTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyMDg3NDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thanks,

Hillary [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjI2OTM2MTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyMDg3NDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0) Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 5/11/15 and 5/28/15 or 5/29/15 and 6/5/15. Enter by contributing [**here**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjI2OTM2MTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyMDg3NDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0) or click [**here**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjI2OTM2MTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYyMDg3NDMzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter without contributing. Two winners will receive a special invitation to a campaign event with Hillary Clinton, round trip tickets for winners to event from within the 50 U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico, two nights hotel accommodations (approx. retail value of all prizes $2000). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America, 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201.

clean_body: I want to meet you. | Friend -- Months from now, I want to look back at this first big rally as the moment when we came together to celebrate the beginning of this campaign. I want to remember it as one that I shared with the people who are driving this campaign -- supporters like you. This campaign is being shaped one story at a time. Everywhere I go, I meet people whose words and stories stay with me. I'd like you to be one of the next people I meet. Come join me and tell me your story: Thanks, Hillary Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 5/11/15 and 5/28/15 or 5/29/15 and 6/5/15. Enter by contributing or click to enter without contributing. Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. name: Rand Paul
subject: Am I on my own?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

Did you get a chance to see my interview on Hannity?

I filibustered the so-called "PATRIOT Act" because the time is now to END illegal domestic spying.

Not when the next President takes office.

Not in two months.

But right now.

That's why I announced today I am introducing a series of amendments to end the NSA's bulk data collection.

But the Washington Machine is lining up against me.

The Obama Administration has come out in favor of "reforms" that don't end the bulk data collection program.

And spy state apologists in BOTH parties are fuming that I scrambled their scheme to ram through renewal of illegal domestic spying ahead of a holiday weekend.

**[Fellow Conservative, I'm counting on you to stand with me in this fight](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27922597:26843839235:m:1:879035888:3F39F3AF4BBBFCA56D618DB9238DE089:r)**.

The Washington Machine can threaten and use legislative deadlines to try and bully my colleagues, but the strength of our movement is in the millions of fed up patriots across America demanding their government abide by the Bill of Rights.

Over 125,000 Americans have already signed on to my fight to end the NSA's bulk data collection program.

**[Will you join us](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27922597:26843839235:m:1:879035888:3F39F3AF4BBBFCA56D618DB9238DE089:r)**?

Fellow Conservative, my 10.5 hour filibuster was the first successful roadblock to stopping renewal of the so-called "PATRIOT Act."

But the crucial votes could come as soon as Saturday.

And with time running out before this lawless legislation expires on May 31st, the clock is our ally.

**[So please stand with me as I force defenders of the surveillance state to debate my amendments in front of the American people](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27922597:26843839235:m:1:879035888:3F39F3AF4BBBFCA56D618DB9238DE089:r)**.

And after you add your name, **[please chip in your most generous contribution](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27922597:26843839235:m:1:879035888:3F39F3AF4BBBFCA56D618DB9238DE089:r)** to help me rally patriots across America to turn up the heat on Congress and end illegal NSA spying now.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27922598:26843839235:m:1:879035888:3F39F3AF4BBBFCA56D618DB9238DE089:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27922599:26843839235:m:1:879035888:3F39F3AF4BBBFCA56D618DB9238DE089:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27922600:26843839235:m:1:879035888:3F39F3AF4BBBFCA56D618DB9238DE089:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27922601:26843839235:m:1:879035888:3F39F3AF4BBBFCA56D618DB9238DE089:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27922597:26843839235:m:1:879035888:3F39F3AF4BBBFCA56D618DB9238DE089:r)
In Liberty,

Senator Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27922602:26843839235:m:1:879035888:3F39F3AF4BBBFCA56D618DB9238DE089:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27922603:26843839235:m:1:879035888:3F39F3AF4BBBFCA56D618DB9238DE089:r)[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/27922604:26843839235:m:1:879035888:3F39F3AF4BBBFCA56D618DB9238DE089:r)

name: Team Bernie
subject: "I could finally..."
body:
#
Dear Friend,
We heard from almost 25,000 supporters about how their lives would change if Bernie's bill passed to make college tuition free **_and_** reduce interest rates on existing student loans.
Some of these stories struck the heart of what Bernie's campaign for president is about: restoring hope, rebuilding the middle class, and taking back our country from powerful special interests.
**Read their stories below:**
[**Sign the Petition: Support Free College Tuition
and Reduced Student Loan Interest Rates**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2119/43f17890/5e190faa/621de23b/1433247369/VEsH/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/college-for-all?source=em150521a&utm_medium=email&utm_source=teambernie&utm_campaign=college&utm_content=stories")
"Free tuition would mean I could actually attend college, something that is out of reach for me currently. My family is broke (my parents filed for bankruptcy a few years ago), and I refuse to apply for loans that will stay with me for the rest of my life. Free tuition would help me be able to get a higher education without crippling my finances" **\- Holly from New Hampshire**
"If college tuition were free, my son would be able to go to college without having to worry about being crushed under huge student loan debt. I would also love to take classes, as my parents couldn't afford it for me either. If there was a way to refinance loans, my husband's student loan debt, which is in the tens of thousands, would become much easier for us to manage. If other countries can do it, so can we." **\- Bonnie from Washington**
"Having free tuition would make a HUGE difference to those I work with daily. I am a high school teacher and I have students who have dreams of college but are not financially able to pay for it. They feel worried and stressed trying to come up with a way to pay for it. Many times they move on to lower paying jobs because they cannot get the training they need." **\- Rebecca from California**
"As the parent of two kids, ages 11 and 14, it would eliminate the terror I'm feeling, wondering how we're going to pay for college for our kids." **\- Emily from New York**
[**Sign the Petition: Support Free College Tuition
and Reduced Student Loan Interest Rates**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2119/43f17890/5e190faa/621de23b/1433247369/VEsE/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/college-for-all?source=em150521a&utm_medium=email&utm_source=teambernie&utm_campaign=college&utm_content=stories")
"I am 4 classes away from a degree but could no longer continue because it was simply putting us further into debt and I couldn't do that to my family. Getting a complete education became selfish. This bill would allow me to finish my schooling without worry. It would allow me to pursue the career in behavioral economics that I have always wanted. I also wouldn't have to worry about putting my daughter through school. We currently live in poverty despite our efforts to better ourselves to become better contributors to society. It would be a relief to know that my bright young child would be given every opportunity to succeed in this competitive global community." **\- Emily from Alaska**
"I could finish my degree! I am only 3 credits short of my associates degree, but I cannot afford the money or time as a single father working minimum wage right now, and I fear the debt I have thus far accumulated will haunt me." **\- Nate from Oregon**
"Free tuition means that my talented, intelligent granddaughter could go to college. She was accepted at several schools, but none of them offered enough funding for us to afford it. Now she feels like her dream went up in smoke. Bernie, please help others like this talented, amazing young woman." **\- Carrie from Massachusetts**
"If tuition was free, I would immediately enroll. I'm tired of people thinking of me as an unintelligent individual because I do not attend college. I'm tired of people asking me if I'm in school & having to respond "no," and then looking at the judgement that is written all over their faces. Just because I have not attended college does not make me stupid or lesser than, it means that my family and I do not have the financial advantages that other families in this country do. " **\- Michon from Nevada**
"My daughter will be entering her junior year of high school this coming fall. That means college is just around the corner. Since she was a little girl she's wanted to become a doctor. I'm confident that she'll have some colleges tripping over themselves to take her and offering generous financial aid packages, but I also know that won't be enough. She may see little cost in getting her undergraduate degree, but what about medical school? Will she be forced to take on a mountain of debt to not only realize her dream, but help to address the enormous need we have for primary care doctors? Will the money I've set aside for retirement go toward helping her get a leg up on starting her own life? I ask myself these questions a lot." **\- Chris from Colorado**
[**Sign the Petition: Support Free College Tuition
and Reduced Student Loan Interest Rates**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2119/43f17890/5e190faa/621de23b/1433247369/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/college-for-all?source=em150521a&utm_medium=email&utm_source=teambernie&utm_campaign=college&utm_content=stories")
"After my parents lost their home in 2008, the year of my high school graduation, things haven't been easy. Since the financial crisis I've been working full-time and doing part-time school. Thankfully, after 6 long years, I will graduate this fall. Although working through school has helped cover some of my school costs, I still owe over $28,000 in student loans. If my interest rates were lower my girlfriend and I could finally afford to get married, buy a home, and start a family." **\- Jeremy from Wisconsin**
"If tuition was free and rates were lowered my mom can refinance her loans. She can go back to school at nights or distance, this time for free. She can expand her education. She wants to help families with disabled children. She needs to learn. Right now she has no viable route to get there. With this bill she will. " **\- Kendra from Massachusetts**
"As a Mom of three who never went to college when I was young for financial reasons, I would be able to get the education I've always dreamed about to provide for my family without having to worry about paying off two student loans (my husband's and mine), which seems impossible... Thank you so much for your courage and positive outlook." **\- Alyssa from Colorado**
"I'm a vet using my GI bill. I'm so lucky to be able to concentrate on school without having a job or bills. Being a full-time stepmom while going to school is hard but it teaches my children that education is extremely important in today's world. If their education was free my husband and I would worry a whole less about how we're going to pay for their college and wouldn't push them to join the military just for the education benefits." **\- Hilary from North Dakota**
"Free tuition would take so much weight off of the shoulders of my wife and me. Our daughter is 12 and we've been saving for her college since her birth. Still, we know that we will not have enough money saved 6 years from now, and the thought of her going into debt saddens me. She, like all young people, should not have to start their professional and adult lives under crushing debt." **\- Geron from New Mexico**
[**Sign the Petition: Support Free College Tuition
and Reduced Student Loan Interest Rates**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2119/43f17890/5e190faa/621de23b/1433247369/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/college-for-all?source=em150521a&utm_medium=email&utm_source=teambernie&utm_campaign=college&utm_content=stories")
"I'm a single mother with three children, one who has special needs. I was rocking college and after attending for a year my GPA was 3.91. Then, I got sick. I've been struggling to find out what is wrong with me for seven months. Because I'm on state insurance, dental coverage is VERY limited. I have three abscessed teeth due to grinding. I've waited for over two months already to get them removed because that's all that's offered with state insurance. In the process my car was repossessed. I also lost financial aid and now have to pay it back. I have no job. I don't even get child support. I don't want to live like this. I want a chance to make it. " **\- Tarylyn from Washington**
"This bill would mean I could finish my degree. I could stop waiting tables and stop living paycheck to paycheck. We wouldn't have to choose rent or food, or gas or rent. My children could go to college without the worry of how to pay for it. They wouldn't be in my situation. My last two tax returns were non existent because they were taken for my student loans. I can't pay them because I have to feed my children and keep a roof over our heads. My husband and I are barely keeping afloat." **\- Kendra from California**
"As a public school teacher, free public tuition would change my life because it would change my students' lives. They will no longer give school half effort because they know their family can't afford to send them to college anyway. The poorest of my students will see a clear and attainable path into the middle class via higher education. My students will have hope instead of worrying about whether or not they will have enough food that night. My life wouldn't just change -- the lives of everyone would change, and for the better. And that's a good thing. " **\- Dakota from Indiana**
"As a college student, this means everything. I was a student at a flagship university but had to transfer to a community college after two years because I was no longer able to afford it. Free tuition would me a second chance at an amazing education." **\- Brittney from Texas**
"My daughters are 13 and 15. My 15 year old is a super genius and really could go to the most elite college. However, I'm not sure how I'm going to pay for it. She has grand ideas and ideals but I will most likely have to either tell her to dial it back, or I will dip into my retirement fund in order to pay for her dreams. " **\- Adrienne from Pennsylvania**
"Free tuition would mean the world to me as I'm a single parent and my son is 16 and wants to go to college. He sees me struggle every day to raise him and he wants to not struggle when he is a adult." **\- Scott from Illinois**
[**Sign the Petition: Support Free College Tuition
and Reduced Student Loan Interest Rates**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2119/43f17890/5e190faa/621de23b/1433247369/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/college-for-all?source=em150521a&utm_medium=email&utm_source=teambernie&utm_campaign=college&utm_content=stories")
Thank you again for all of your support.
\- Team Bernie
** **
****[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2119/43f17890/5e190faa/621de238/1433247369/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=emb150521a")****
** **
** **

** **
Paid for by Bernie 2016
(not the billionaires)
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but if you'd like to, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2119/43f17890/5e190faa/621de239/1433247369/VEsB/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2119/43f17890/5e190faa/621de226/1433247369/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
